backend/main.mo: Main actor defining all data types (UserProfile, Note, MedicalReport, LegalAnalysis, TimetableEntry, Quiz, RevisionReminder) with their storage maps, CRUD operations, and domain classification logic for a multi-domain intelligent notes application.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades old actor state to new schema by adding a 'domain' field (defaulting to #general) to existing notes and medical reports, and initializing _nextTimetableId counter.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features: legal document analysis, smart timetable for students, automatic quiz generation, and revision reminder system, with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend TypeScript/React components, pages, hooks, and configuration files describing their purpose and functionality.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm OKLCH color palette (amber/orange/coral) for both light and dark themes, supporting healthcare aesthetics.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx, titled 'AI-Powered Multi-Domain Intelligent Notes'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component with TanStack Router setup defining routes (landing, notes, reports, timetable, quizzes, reminders), authentication flow, profile setup modal, and theme provider wrapper.
frontend/src/components/DocumentUpload.t: Document upload component with file selection, validation (PDF/TXT, 10MB max), ExternalBlob upload with progress tracking, automatic domain classification alert, and medical icon display.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component with header navigation, user authentication state, and responsive sidebar menu for Notes, Documents, Timetable, Quizzes, and Reminders sections.
frontend/src/components/LegalAnalysisVie: Component for viewing and editing legal document analysis including clauses, obligations, rights, parties, and important dates with accordion-based UI and save functionality.
frontend/src/components/NoteCard.tsx: Card component displaying individual note preview with domain badge (medical/legal/general), AI insights, timestamp, and edit/delete actions with confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/NoteEditor.tsx: Modal editor for creating and editing notes with title and content fields, displaying AI analysis notification and handling save/cancel operations.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time user profile setup requiring name input, displayed on initial authentication with non-dismissible overlay.
frontend/src/components/QuizCard.tsx: Card component displaying quiz metadata (title, question count, creation date) with a button to launch the quiz-taking dialog interface.
frontend/src/components/QuizGenerationDi: Dialog component for generating AI-powered quizzes with a title input field. Currently uses hardcoded sample medical questions and saves them via the useSaveQuiz hook.
frontend/src/components/QuizTaker.tsx: Interactive quiz-taking component that displays questions one at a time with radio button options, tracks progress, and shows a results screen with score and answer review.
frontend/src/components/ReminderCard.tsx: Card component displaying a revision reminder with topic, next revision date, and revision count. Provides buttons to mark as revised (schedules next revision 7 days later) or deactivate the reminder.
frontend/src/components/ReminderForm.tsx: Form component for creating new revision reminders with topic and next revision date inputs. Uses useCreateRevisionReminder hook to save the reminder.
frontend/src/components/ReportAnalysis.t: Component for viewing and editing analysis of medical or legal reports. Displays report metadata, domain-specific icons, and conditionally renders LegalAnalysisView for legal documents.
frontend/src/components/ReportCard.tsx: Card component displaying a medical or legal report summary with domain badge, upload date, and analysis status. Opens a dialog with ReportAnalysis component when clicked.
frontend/src/components/TimetableEntry.t: React component that displays a single timetable entry card with type-specific icons, time/location details, recurring badge, and a delete button with confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/TimetableEntryFo: Form component for creating new timetable entries with fields for entry type, title, start/end times, location, and recurring checkbox, using the useCreateTimetableEntry hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using Internet Identity, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotes.ts: Custom hooks for notes CRUD operations (get all, get one, create, edit, delete) using React Query and the backend actor, with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuizzes.ts: Custom hooks for quiz operations (get user quizzes, get single quiz, save quiz) using React Query and the backend actor with cache management.
frontend/src/hooks/useReminders.ts: Custom hooks for revision reminder operations (get all, create, update, deactivate) using React Query and the backend actor with automatic query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useReports.ts: Custom hooks for medical reports and legal analysis operations including upload, retrieval, and saving analysis/legal data with React Query cache management.
frontend/src/hooks/useTimetable.ts: React Query hooks for fetching user timetable entries, creating new entries with parameters like title/time/location/recurring, and deleting entries by ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and saving the current user's profile, with loading states and query invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom warm color palette (amber/orange/rose) for medical/healthcare context, including light and dark mode theme variables.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page showcasing AI-powered multi-domain notes features (medical analysis, legal documents, smart notes, timetables, quizzes) with hero banner and login button.
frontend/src/pages/NotesPage.tsx: Notes management page displaying user notes in a grid, with create/edit functionality via dialog modal and empty state prompts.
frontend/src/pages/QuizzesPage.tsx: Quizzes page displaying AI-generated quizzes from notes in a grid layout, with quiz generation dialog and empty state.
frontend/src/pages/RemindersPage.tsx: Reminders page showing active and inactive revision reminders in separate sections, with add reminder dialog and empty state.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: React page component for document analysis that displays uploaded medical/legal reports in a grid, with upload dialog and empty state prompts. Uses useGetUserReports hook to fetch data and shows loading spinner during fetch.
frontend/src/pages/TimetablePage.tsx: React page component for managing student timetable entries (classes, study sessions, exams, deadlines). Displays entries in a list with add/edit dialog and empty state, using useGetUserTimetableEntries hook.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for extracting and persisting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration for parameter persistence across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extending default colors (using OKLCH color space), warm shadow utilities, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining an AI-powered multi-domain notes app with medical/legal document analysis, smart timetable, quiz generation, and auto-domain classification. Lists existing features including authentication, document upload, and analysis capabilities.
